title: Find $$r$$
text: Since De Moivre's Theorem applies to complex numbers written in polar form, we must first write $$1+i$$ in polar form. What is $$r$$?

title: Find tan(θ)
text: Use the formula $$tan(\theta)=\frac{y}{x}$$, what is θ?

title: Use DeMoivre's
text: According to De Moivre's, $$\left(a+bi\right)^n=r^{n\left(cos\left(n \theta\right)+\operatorname{isin}\left(n \theta\right)\right)}$$. Plug in our values for $$r$$ and θ as well as $$n=5$$ to get the final answer.
